nodeDescription.name: n8n-nodes-preview-mrscraper.mrscraper
nodeDescription.subtitle: ={{$parameter["operation"] + ": " + $parameter["resource"]}}

options.name: Run Manual Scraper
options.description: Rerun a manual scraper you already created (e.g. at app.mrscraper.com/scrapers/form?mode=manual). Provide the scraper ID and one URL to get the result.

options.name: Run General Agent Scraper
options.description: Rerun a General Agent scraper you created (e.g at app.mrscraper.com/scrapers/form). Provide the scraper ID and one URL to get the result.

options.name: Run Listing Agent Scraper
options.description: Rerun a Listing Agent scraper you created (e.g at app.mrscraper.com/scrapers/form). Provide the scraper ID and one URL to get the result.

options.name: Run Map Agent Scraper
options.description: Rerun a Map Agent scraper you created (e.g at app.mrscraper.com/scrapers/form). Provide the scraper ID and one URL to get the result.

options.name: Get Results
options.description: Get results based on given page number, page size, filters, and sorting by scraper ID

options.name: Get Latest Results
options.description: Get N latest results by scraper ID

options.name: Get Result Detail
options.description: Get a result detail by its result ID

options.name: Create General Agent Scraper
options.description: Create a General Agent (AI) scraper at Mrscraper platform using input link and message

options.name: Create Listing Agent Scraper
options.description: Create a listing agent (AI) scraper at Mrscraper platform using input link and message

options.name: Create Map Agent Scraper
options.description: Create a map agent (AI) scraper at Mrscraper platform using input link and message

options.name: Get Account Info
options.description: Get account details including token usage and token limits

options.name: AI Agent
options.description: Create an AI agent scraper on the Mrscraper platform. Choose General, Listing, or Map agent type.

options.name: Batch Scrape URLs
options.description: Run multiple URLs in one batch against a scraper you created in the app. Choose AI or manual scraper mode.

options.name: Crawl Website Sitemap
options.description: Crawl a website sitemap and extract all URLs up to a limit

options.name: Scrape Dynamic Content by Prompt
options.description: Create a General Agent (AI) scraper at Mrscraper platform using input link and Prompt to instruct the agent on what data to extract

options.name: Scrape Paginated Content
options.description: Listing agent on api.mrscraper.com: send URL, prompt, agent listing, and maxPages for paginated scrape

options.name: Scrape Search Results
options.description: Create a listing agent (AI) scraper at Mrscraper platform using input link and message

options.name: Scrape Structured Data
options.description: Create a General Agent (AI) scraper with a preset schema by category (article, product, hotel, etc.). The prompt is chosen from the selected category.

options.name: Scrape Web Page
options.description: Fetch the rendered HTML of a page via the MrScraper stealth browser (JavaScript, bot evasion, optional geo proxy)

options.name: Fetch Rendered HTML
options.description: Fetch the rendered HTML of a page via the MrScraper stealth browser (JavaScript, bot evasion, optional geo proxy)

attributes.description: Interact with the MrScraper API

options.description: Remove a user from an assessment. Object information. A user can not be removed this way if they are assigned to the assessment through a team. This does **not** delete the user, it just revokes th...

options.name: List clients
options.description: Retrieve a list of all accessible clients. Object information. To also retrieve the logos of the clients, specify the "documents" relation in the request. See Including Related Data.

options.name: Create a client
options.description: Create a new client. Object information. To add a logo to a client, attach a document representing the logo to it in a separate request. See Documents.

options.name: Retrieve a client
options.description: Retrieve all details of the given client. Object information. To also retrieve the logo of the client, specify the "documents" relation in the request. See Including Related Data.

options.name: Update a client
options.description: Update an existing client. Object information. To add or replace a logo for a client, create a document for it in a separate request. This will overwrite the existing avatar. See Documents.

options.name: Update client managers
options.description: Update the list of client managers for a client. Client managers can manage this list but cannot remove themselves.

options.name: Remove account manager
options.description: Remove an account manager from the client. Optionally, specify assessments to unassign the manager from.

options.name: List custom fields
options.description: Retrieve a list of all accessible custom fields Object information.

options.name: Retrieve a document
options.description: Retrieve the stored file contents of the given document. Object information.

options.name: Upload a document
options.description: Upload a new (draft) document. Object information. Use `Content-Type: multipart/form-data` for this request.

options.name: List findings
options.description: Retrieve a list of all accessible findings. Object information.

options.name: List finding events

options.name: Create a finding comment
options.description: Create a new finding comment. Object information. Note that comments added before the publication of the finding are displayed as child comments of the 'created event' of the finding.

options.name: Update a finding comment
options.description: Update an existing finding comment. Object information.

options.description: Search for finding templates. It is not possible to include relations or filter the search. Object information. If a search term is submitted and neither "prefer_language" nor "language_id" are, th...

options.name: Retrieve a finding template
options.description: Retrieve all details of the given finding. Object information.

options.name: Update a finding template
options.description: Update an existing finding template. Object information. Only custom finding templates (`source`: 0) can be updated.

options.name: List languages

options.name: Upload an output file to parse

options.description: Create a new user. Object information. To add an avatar to a user, create a document for it in a separate request. See Documents.
